chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4824 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 Mr. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Javed, advocate for respondent. Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition is pending since 2023 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
